description.en: Crispy vegetable spring rolls served with sweet chili sauce
description.es: Rollos crujientes de verduras servidos con salsa de chile dulce

description.es: Dumplings al vapor de cerdo y verduras con salsa de soja

description.en: Steamed edamame pods tossed with sea salt
description.es: Vainas de edamame al vapor con sal marina

description.en: Clear broth with shrimp and pork wontons and bok choy
description.es: Caldo claro con wontons de camarón y cerdo y col china

description.es: Pollo salteado con cacahuetes, chiles y pimienta de Sichuan

description.en: Crispy pork pieces glazed with tangy sweet and sour sauce, garnished with pineapple
description.es: Trozos crujientes de cerdo glaseados con salsa agridulce y piña
description.zh: 酥脆猪肉配糖醋酱，点缀菠萝

description.en: Fragrant jasmine green tea, freshly brewed
description.es: Té verde de jazmín fragante, recién preparado

description.en: Traditional chilled sour plum drink with a hint of sweetness
description.es: Bebida tradicional fría de ciruela ácida con un toque dulce

description.en: Freshly made warm soy milk, lightly sweetened

description.en: Sparkling soda with fresh lychee flavor and a splash of lime
